segments.text: From zackray, just a drift back from the fair.
That airdodge is so clean coming out from Spargo as well.
Got a cross slash, but there's the up tilt.
Getting the very last hit of the up air.
The chase down, multiple jump on pit is going to make the tracking on.

full_text: From zackray, just a drift back from the fair. That airdodge is so clean coming out from Spargo as well. The limit is low, though. Got a cross slash, but there's the up tilt. Getting the very last hit of the up air. The chase down, multiple jump on pit is going to make the tracking on.
